title: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About Roblox Q4 Earnings
text: Analysts expect Roblox to report fourth-quarter 2023 revenue of $1.35 billion, up from $1.13 billion in the prior year's fourth quarter. Analysts expect Roblox to report a loss of 45 cents per share in the fourth quarter, an improvement from a loss of 52 cents per share in the year-ago quarter. For bookings, analysts expect a figure of $1.38 billion, in contrast to the year-ago figure of $1.13 billion. Daily Active Users (DAUs) are forecast to reach 89.09 million, compared to 71.5 million reported in the same quarter last year. Total Hours Engaged should come in at 19.96 billion, compared to 15.5 billion reported in the same quarter of the previous year. The company has beaten analyst estimates for revenue in two straight quarters and seven of the past 10 quarters overall, and has beaten analyst estimates for earnings per share in five straight quarters and six of the past 10 quarters overall. This track record suggests potential for another earnings beat in the upcoming Q4 2023 report.
